text: Is speciation happening without physical barriers? Let’s dive deep. Sympatric speciation suggests new species can evolve in the same habitat, but it’s controversial. Some scientists claim it’s rare, yet cases like cichlid fishes challenge that view. Genetic studies show how different niches can lead to diverging paths in the same environment. But, uncertainty remains. Is it common enough to redefine our understanding of evolution? Curious about evolution? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
